name: @databehave/server
description: A JSON file config-driven mock server
author: ochairo

scripts.build:admin: vite build --config vite.admin.config.ts && mv dist/admin/ui-shell.html dist/admin/ui.html
scripts.build: pnpm run build:admin && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/bin.js
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.ui.json --noEmit
scripts.prepack: if [ -n "$PREPACK_SKIP_TESTS" ]; then echo '[prepack] PREPACK_SKIP_TESTS set — skipping tests'; else pnpm test:no-coverage; fi && pnpm clean && pnpm run build:admin && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/bin.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm clean && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
